<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused: one logical change. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- Brief summary of the change and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run ./...` passes
- [ ] `govulncheck ./...` is clean
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behaviour changes (fuzz target for new parsers)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` and README updated if behaviour/features changed
- [ ] No secrets or real proxy lists committed

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, etc. -->
